# Task Queue Service with Priority Scheduling

## Description
A lightweight in-memory task queue with priority-based scheduling, O(log n) operations using heapq, status tracking, and comprehensive statistics reporting.

## Tech Stack
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Language** | python |
| **Framework** | N/A |

No external dependencies detected.

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
python 009b824a0658455c8717f99ff75bf4c5_task_queue.py
```
